items.title: Redirect p99 < 50 ms
items.desc: From the moment a browser sends GET /:slug to the moment it gets a 302 response — under 50 ms at the 99th percentile, measured from the same region as the VPS.

items.title: Survives reboot + buffered writes
items.desc: All link state in durable storage before any 200 is returned to the creator. Analytics events are buffered locally and replayed if the analytics backend is briefly unreachable.

items.title: No PII storage
items.desc: IP addresses are SHA-256 hashed with a per-instance salt before any write. No cookies on the redirect path. No third party scripts ever in the dashboard.

items.title: One binary, one config
items.desc: Single static Go binary plus one TOML config file. No external dependencies for the redirect path (cache is in-process by default; external cache is opt-in).
